title: DAHUD - Hud Medieval
description: A clean and immersive medieval-style HUD that displays health, hunger, player name. Perfect for fantasy roleplay adventures!
body:
⚔️ **Medieval RPG HUD** – Update Release

A lightweight client-side mod that replaces the default Minecraft HUD with a clean medieval RPG-style interface.

## **🔑 Features**

Custom Health & Hunger Bars – redesigned with earthy medieval tones

Experience Bar & Level Display – integrated with a clear RPG style

Player Name Display – shown in an elegant medieval font

Custom Hotbar – themed design with hover effects

Minimal Layout – optimized for immersion, no unnecessary clutter

Edit Mode (Key: K) – move and save your HUD/hotbar layout
## **
## ⚙️ Technical Info**

Supported versions: Minecraft 1.20.1

Loaders: Forge & Fabric

Client-side only: ✅ (no server installation required)

Lightweight & plug-and-play

## **🌍 Use Cases**

RPG & fantasy roleplay servers

Immersive survival playthroughs

Custom modpacks with medieval themes

⚔️ Medieval RPG HUD — a functional and immersive interface for RPG-style gameplay.
